title: Crenulluma flava

However, it is widely classified under the family Asclepiadaceae. This plant is further classified under the subfamily Periplocoideae and tribe Periplocoideae. intro: Crenulluma flava, also known as Cucumis flavidus, is a type of creeping succulent plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been reported to possess several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The bioactive constituents of Crenulluma flava include flavonoids, alkaloids, and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
